backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for The Blush salon app, implementing blob storage, authorization, user profiles, services, staff, appointments, and customer photos with access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (visual theme, navigation, pages, components) to their corresponding files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's purpose, hooks used, and design system details for the salon app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark modes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for The Blush React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining all app routes (home, services, team, book, admin, gallery) wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentTable: Admin appointment table component displaying appointments with service/staff name lookups, status badges, and confirm/cancel action buttons with per-row loading spinners.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: A React form component for booking salon appointments that collects client name, service, stylist, date, and time, then submits via the useBookAppointment mutation and displays a confirmation summary on success.
frontend/src/components/CustomerPhotoMan: A React component for salon admins to upload client transformation photos (with name, review, and image file) and delete existing ones, using add/delete mutations and displaying current photos in a grid.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the app shell with a sticky header (logo, desktop nav, mobile hamburger menu, Book Now CTA) and a footer, wrapping page content via a Layout component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for the backend actor, covering services, staff, appointments (book and update status), and customer photos (fetch, add with chunked upload progress, delete).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a luxury design system with CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including gold, rose, charcoal, and cream color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying appointment statistics and tabbed views (pending/confirmed/cancelled/all) via AppointmentTable, plus a CustomerPhotoManager tab, with refresh and new-booking actions.
frontend/src/pages/Book.tsx: Booking page with a hero banner image, a BookingForm component spanning two columns, and a sidebar showing what to expect, location, and hours information.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page that fetches and displays customer transformation photos in a responsive grid with client name and review quote, showing skeletons while loading and an empty state when no photos exist.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home landing page featuring a full-viewport hero section with CTAs, a stats bar, a features grid, and additional salon information sections using the luxury design system.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Displays salon services grouped by category (Hair, Color, Treatment, Nails, Skin) with cards showing name, description, duration, price, and a booking link. Includes skeleton loading states and a hero section header.
frontend/src/pages/Team.tsx: Renders a grid of staff member cards with initials avatar, role, bio, and hardcoded specialty tags, fetched via useStaffMembers hook. Includes skeleton loading states and a hero section.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom serif/sans font families, design-system color tokens (gold, rose, charcoal, cream), box shadows, and fade-in animations for the salon UI.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for 'The Blush' salon website, recording schema version, feature history, image requirements, and architectural notes for the high-end redesign.
